name: chat-bot
description: Evagene integration example: Slack and Microsoft Teams chat-bot that answers /evagene <pedigree-id> with the NICE triage decision.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test test/slackVerifier.test.ts test/teamsVerifier.test.ts test/evageneClient.test.ts test/handlers.test.ts test/renderSlack.test.ts test/renderTeams.test.ts test/server.test.ts
